conditions: 6 AM is dawning, with ominous clouds fast encroaching on the Hole. But don't be alarmed; it's just an approaching round of snow, coming to re-stoke your soul. So, have no fear; grab your gear and come get weird. Scattered showers will be popping off through the morning in prelude to a steadier powfall this afternoon. Gusty west winds will be cranking in the 10 to 40 mph range, further cooling high temperatures that only reach the teens at the summit and the mid-30s in Teton Village. Everyone knows that eternal youth isn't really found in some kind of fountain. But the jury's still out on the effects of a snow-coated mountain. -Lege
